Class UserData

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.jUser.controller.UserData
@Component public class UserData extends Object
Service component for managing user data records in the database.

This class handles user profile information including name, address, and contact details. It supports profile updates and maintains search functionality for finding users by name.

Key functionality:

  • Add/update user profile data
  • Fetch user profile information
  • Search users by first name, last name, or middle name
  • Save user data records individually or in batch

  • Method Details

    • migratePreviousRecordtoUserHistory

      @Deprecated public void migratePreviousRecordtoUserHistory(UserLoginTBL user)
      Deprecated.
      This method is no longer needed
      Migrates previous user profile snapshots to the user data history.

      This method was used to archive old profile records before updates. It is no longer needed as the history migration is handled differently.

      Parameters:
      user - the user whose records should be migrated

    • add

      public void add(UserLoginTBL user, EditUserDataServicesREQ editUserDataREQ)
      Adds or updates user profile data from a request object.

      This method populates the user's profile information from the request and saves it to the database. If the user already has profile data, it updates the existing record; otherwise, it creates a new one.

      Parameters:
      user - the user to add/update profile data for
      editUserDataREQ - the request object containing profile data

    • fetch

      public Optional<UserDataTBL> fetch(UserLoginTBL user, Boolean active)
      Fetches user profile data for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      user - the user to fetch profile data for
      active - the active status to filter by (currently unused)
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the user profile data if found, empty otherwise

    • searchUserFirstname

      public List<UserDataTBL> searchUserFirstname(String searchString)
      Searches for users by first name prefix.
      Parameters:
      searchString - the prefix to search for in first names
      Returns:
      list of users whose first name starts with the search string

    • searchUserLastname

      public List<UserDataTBL> searchUserLastname(String searchString)
      Searches for users by last name prefix.
      Parameters:
      searchString - the prefix to search for in last names
      Returns:
      list of users whose last name starts with the search string

    • searchUserMiddlename

      public List<UserDataTBL> searchUserMiddlename(String searchString)
      Searches for users by middle name prefix.
      Parameters:
      searchString - the prefix to search for in middle names
      Returns:
      list of users whose middle name starts with the search string

    • save

      public void save()
      Saves the current user data record from the data field to the database.

      The saved entity (with generated ID) is stored back in the data field.

    • saveAll

      public void saveAll()
      Saves all user data records in the dataList to the database in a batch operation.

      After saving, the list is cleared and repopulated with the saved entities (including any generated IDs).
